class.name: Pasture3DLayer
class.brief_description: A single non-destructive height-map layer in a [Pasture3DLayerStack].
class.description: Stores sparse, sub-region tiled pixel data as (value, weight) pairs ([code]FORMAT_RGF[/code]: R = value, G = weight). A weight of 0 means the pixel is not owned by this layer and is skipped when compositing. The dense Base layer may instead alias a region's plain [code]FORMAT_RF[/code] height map, in which case it is always covered (weight 1). This is editor-only authoring data. The stack is composited down into the runtime [Pasture3DRegion] images, so layers add no runtime cost. Version 1 supports height layers only ([code]TYPE_HEIGHT[/code]).
